builds.playstyle_zh: 厚血,慢节奏,双手大剑碾压
builds.weakness: Slow attack speed, poor against agile bosses
builds.weakness_zh: 出招慢,对灵巧 Boss 表现差
builds.summary_en: The most beginner-friendly build. Massive damage per hit makes most fights forgiving.
builds.summary_zh: 最适合新手的流派。单次伤害极高,容错率最高。

builds.playstyle_en: Fast attacks, dual katanas, status bleed proc
builds.playstyle_zh: 快速攻击,双持打刀,出血叠加
builds.weapon_buff: Blood Affinity / Seppuku Ash of War
builds.weakness_zh: 免疫出血的敌人(骷髅、龙)
builds.summary_en: The most fun-to-play build in the game. Bleed procs delete bosses in 3-5 hits.
builds.summary_zh: 游戏中手感最爽的流派。出血触发可 3-5 击秒杀 Boss。

builds.playstyle_en: Long-range glintstone spells, kite and outspace
builds.playstyle_zh: 远程辉石法术,放风筝拉扯
builds.primary_weapon_en: Carian Regal Scepter / Lusat's Glintstone Staff
builds.primary_weapon_zh: 卡利亚君王节杖 / 鲁萨特辉石杖
builds.weakness_zh: 蓝量管理,反魔法敌人难处理
builds.summary_en: The classic 'mage' fantasy. Comet Azur deletes most main bosses in one cast.
builds.summary_zh: 经典法师玩法。彗星·阿祖尔一发清场大部分主线 Boss。

builds.playstyle_en: Dragon breath incantations, AoE area control
builds.summary_en: Become a dragon. Ekzykes's Decay and Rotten Breath are S-tier.
builds.summary_zh: 化身为龙。艾克扎克斯腐败 + 腐烂龙息为顶级技能。

builds.weakness: Banned in some PvP, requires Mohgwyn Palace access
builds.weakness_zh: 部分 PvP 服务器禁用,需通关至蒙格温王朝
builds.summary_en: The infamous 'easy mode'. Three Corpse Pilers melt most bosses.
builds.summary_zh: 臭名昭著的'简单模式'。三连尸山血海融化大多数 Boss。

builds.weakness_zh: 没有特化方向的极致优势
builds.summary_en: The 'Souls classic' build. Available 5 minutes into the game, viable to credits.
builds.summary_zh: 魂系经典流派。游戏开头 5 分钟可拿,可通关全流程。

builds.playstyle_en: Dark Moon Greatsword + Adula's Moonblade combo
builds.playstyle_zh: 黑夜之剑 + 阿杜拉月光剑组合
builds.summary_en: The Ranni ending build. Stylish, balanced, and the Dark Moon weapon art is iconic.
builds.summary_zh: 拉妮结局流派。帅、平衡,黑夜大剑战技标志性极强。

builds.playstyle_en: Giant Crusher / Fallingstar Beast Jaw stagger machine
builds.playstyle_zh: 巨人压碎者 / 陨石兽颚特大武器破韧
builds.weakness: Extremely slow, easily punished by fast bosses
builds.weakness_zh: 极慢,容易被快速 Boss 惩罚
builds.summary_en: If it hits, it staggers. Two hits and you can riposte even Malenia.
builds.summary_zh: 命中即破韧。两击可处决,玛莲妮亚也吃。

builds.playstyle_en: Self-healing through weapon art, fire damage
builds.playstyle_zh: 战技自动回血,火属性输出
builds.weapon_buff: Innate fire damage + Taker's Flames AoW
builds.summary_en: Rykard's Remembrance reward. Heals you on each weapon art hit. Cheese-tier.
builds.summary_zh: 拉卡德追忆奖励。战技命中即回血,无脑流派。

builds.playstyle_zh: 蚁刺刺剑 + 腐烂龙息叠加
builds.weapon_buff: Rotten Winged Sword Insignia talisman stack
builds.weakness_zh: 免疫腐败的敌人,状态叠加慢
builds.summary_en: Apply rot, run away, watch HP melt. Effective against Malenia (poetic justice).
builds.summary_zh: 上腐败,跑路,看血条蒸发。对玛莲妮亚效果极佳(以彼之道还施彼身)。

builds.playstyle_en: Block behind a greatshield, poke through it with a thrusting sword
builds.playstyle_zh: 举大盾防御,从盾后用刺剑戳刺
builds.weapon_buff: Heavy Estoc (No Skill) + Barricade Shield Ash of War
builds.weakness: Stamina drain on heavy hits; grabs and AoE bypass the block
builds.weakness_zh: 重击会大量削耐;抓取和范围攻击无视格挡
builds.summary_en: The ultimate turtle. Hold the shield up, chip away with pokes, clear the DLC and final bosses first try.
builds.summary_zh: 终极乌龟流。举盾不放,慢慢戳,DLC 和最终 Boss 都能一次过。

builds.playstyle_en: Power-stanced curved swords, spam jump and L1 attacks to stack bleed
builds.playstyle_zh: 双持弯刀,狂跳劈 + L1 连段叠出血
builds.primary_weapon_zh: 拾荒者弯刀 ×2(俗称山贼弯刀)
builds.weapon_buff: Seppuku Ash of War (both) + Lord of Blood's Exultation
builds.weakness: Bleed-immune enemies; need two copies to power-stance
builds.weakness_zh: 对免疫出血的敌人无效;需凑齐两把才能双持
builds.summary_en: Seppuku on both, jump attack for ~1.7k a swing — the fastest melee bleed stacker in the game.
builds.summary_zh: 两把都上切腹,一次跳劈约 1.7k,游戏里叠血最快的近战流派。

builds.playstyle_en: Transient Moonlight ranged magic slashes, melt-everything spam
builds.playstyle_zh: 转瞬月光远程魔法斩,无脑连发
builds.weapon_buff: Innate magic damage + Transient Moonlight skill
builds.weakness_zh: 对魔抗敌人乏力;战技连发耗蓝快
builds.summary_en: The iconic early Int/Dex katana. Transient Moonlight's ranged slash does huge poise and magic damage.
builds.summary_zh: 标志性的前期智敏刀。转瞬月光的远程斩兼具破韧和魔法伤害。

builds.playstyle_en: Dragon Cult lightning incantations + Bolt of Gransax ranged throws
builds.playstyle_zh: 龙信仰雷电祈祷 + 格朗桑雷枪远程投掷
builds.primary_weapon_en: Bolt of Gransax + Gravel Stone Seal
builds.primary_weapon_zh: 格朗桑的雷枪 + 砾岩石印记
builds.weakness: Lightning-resistant DLC enemies; weak when forced into melee
builds.weakness_zh: DLC 部分敌人雷抗高;被贴脸时被动
builds.summary_en: Almost nothing resists lightning. Ancient Dragons' Lightning Strike and Lansseax's Glaive clear the board.
builds.summary_zh: 几乎没有敌人抗雷。古龙雷击 + 兰萨克斯雷矛清场无压力。

builds.playstyle_en: Curved greatsword with a built-in evasive lunge skill
builds.playstyle_zh: 曲刃大剑,自带闪避突进战技
builds.weakness: Skill can whiff on small or erratic bosses if you get greedy
builds.weakness_zh: 贪刀时容易在小体型/乱跳 Boss 上空挥
builds.summary_en: Beat Bloodhound Knight Darriwil early for a weapon that carries the whole game — evade and counter in one button.
builds.summary_zh: 前期击败猎犬骑士达利维尔即可获得,一把武器吃满全程。闪避反击一键完成。
